routes.behavior: Proxy to {ORCHESTRATOR_URL}/executions/:id when set; fallback to local getExecution()
routes.errorHandling: RFC 9457 via respondWithProblem() on upstream/network failure

routes.behavior: After building steps, if not LangGraph and ORCHESTRATOR_URL set, POST { sessionId, steps } to {ORCHESTRATOR_URL}/execute and relay response. Rewrite Location to /api/executions/:id
routes.errorHandling: RFC 9457 via respondWithProblem() on upstream/network failure

healthProbe.details: Background GET {ORCHESTRATOR_URL}/healthz with 1.5s timeout; logs status
